creator: mb@lunetics.com
text:
Any updates on this how to name ports? i'm also for pecl-{package}-{PHP_VER}

I also think we should keep the 5.5/5.6/7 packages without {PHP_VER} suffix.

So we have either pecl-{package} for all php versions 

OR

pecl-{package}-php5 and pecl-{package}-php7

btw, pecl-APCu 5.1.5 is out already
